task_completion.description: Verify that the agent successfully logged into LibreHealth EHR as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreHealth EHR dashboard or patient search screen is visible, indicating a successful login (often showing 'admin' in the user profile area).

task_completion.description: Verify that an existing NHANES patient has been selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A patient chart or dashboard is open, displaying the patient's name and demographic information.

task_completion.description: Verify that the prescription or medication entry form is open for the selected patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form for adding a new prescription or medication is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct drug name and dosage are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The drug name field contains 'Metformin' and the dosage field contains '500mg'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct directions are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The directions or instructions field contains exactly 'Take one tablet by mouth twice daily with meals'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct quantity and refills are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The quantity/dispense field contains '60' and the refills field contains '3'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the prescription has been saved or submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed, or the newly added prescription is visible in the patient's active medications list or prescription history.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the LibreHealth EHR graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the LibreHealth EHR interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify that the prescription was entered into the actual EHR system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are within the LibreHealth EHR web forms, not in a text editor, notepad, or mock application.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent genuinely navigated the EHR to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots shows logical progression through the EHR menus (e.g., patient search -> patient chart -> prescriptions -> add new).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified prescription details to check for: Drug name: 'Metformin', Dosage: '500mg', Directions: 'Take one tablet by mouth twice daily with meals', Quantity: '60', Refills: '3'.
